characteristic.name: Record Access Control Point
characteristic.informativeText: Summary: This control point is used with a service to provide basic management functionality for the Glucose Sensor patient record database. This enables functions including counting records, transmitting records and clearing records based on filter criterion. The filter criterion in the Operand field is defined by the service that references this characteristic as is the format of a record (which may be comprised of one or more characteristics) and the sequence of transferred records.
